description: User asks if they need to water given upcoming rain

messages.content: It rained yesterday and I have bermuda grass in Austin, TX. Do I need to water today?

notes: Should route to watering_agent and fetch weather for Austin.

description: User asks about mowing height for their grass type

messages.content: I have St. Augustine grass in Houston. What height should I mow it to this summer?

notes: Should route to lawn_care_agent and call mowing_schedule tool.

description: User asks when and what to fertilize

messages.content: When should I fertilize my fescue lawn? It's about 2,500 square feet.

notes: Should route to lawn_care_agent. Response should include NPK ratio and quantity.

description: User describes pest symptoms for diagnosis

messages.content: My St. Augustine lawn in Florida has yellowing patches in the sunniest spots. The grass feels spongy and seems to be spreading. It's July. What's wrong?

notes: Classic chinch bug symptoms on St. Augustine in summer. Should diagnose correctly.

description: User asks to schedule a reminder

messages.content: Remind me to fertilize my Bermuda lawn in August. It's about 1,500 square feet.

notes: Should route to scheduler_agent and attempt to create a calendar event.

description: User asks an open-ended general question

messages.content: I just moved to a new house with a Zoysia lawn in North Carolina. What should I know?

notes: Orchestrator should provide a helpful overview covering key Zoysia care points.

messages.content: I have a weed with three round leaves and white flowers spreading through my Kentucky Bluegrass. How do I get rid of it?

notes: Clover identification. Should route to diagnosis_agent.

description: User wants a complete care calendar set up

messages.content: Can you set up a full lawn care calendar for my Bermuda grass? My lawn is 3,000 sq ft in Dallas, TX.

notes: Should route to scheduler_agent and call create_lawn_care_calendar.
